leadText: Toxic Thread (Japanese: どくのいと Toxic Thread) is a non-damaging Poison-type move introduced in Generation VII. It is the signature move of Spinarak and Ariados.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Toxic Thread poisons the target and lowers its Speed stat by one stage. Both effects are independent from each other; the target's Speed is still lowered even if it cannot be poisoned (such as if it is a Steel-type or it already has a status condition ), and the target is still poisoned even if its Speed cannot be lowered (due to Clear Body or if the stat is already at -6 stages). If powered up by a Poisonium Z into Z-Toxic Thread, the user's Speed stat is raised by one stage. Generation VIII [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon Sword and Shield [ edit | edit source ] Toxic Thread cannot be selected in a battle.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA S V The user shoots poisonous threads to poison the target and lower the target's Speed stat.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD RT DX It makes a faraway Pokémon Poisoned and reduces their Travel Speed.

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] Excluding Z-Moves , Toxic Thread is the only Poison-type move to not be usable in Pokémon Sword and Shield .
